title: X account social monitoring loop

profile_values.bio: CS Student | Software Engineer | Testing Local LLM's :) - ibrahimsait.blog

pinned_tweet.preview: Article: The Future of Development: When Everyone Becomes a Builder...
pinned_tweet.extraction_note: Visible Nitter text rendered two counts after timestamp; mapped as reposts and likes because reply count was not shown.

carried_forward_markers.reason: Current public Nitter profile/timeline values were available.

fetch_method: public web search/fetch primary; curl -L --max-time 20 fallback for unreadable or inaccessible sources

fetch_status.note: Public web fetch found readable profile/timeline content on nitter.net only; curl fallback confirmed app shells, access denial, browser verification, or connection failure elsewhere.

fetch_attempts.notes: Top results shown did not include the exact @IbrahimSait_ profile; mostly other X posts/profiles containing Ibrahim/Sait terms.
Search surfaced the personal blog and unrelated profiles, but no direct public X timeline for @IbrahimSait_.

fetch_attempts.error_text: No readable timeline from web fetch; curl returned X app shell HTML only.
